drills.name: Loop opening and parking
drills.description: Practice 10 repetitions of opening the loop and parking it around the target appendage before tightening, focusing on completing the full task sequence.
drills.targets_weakness: Unable to complete the formal FLS task structure

drills.name: Mark-centering drill
drills.description: Place the loop at the target mark, pause, and verify alignment before cinching, emphasizing clear start and completion states.
drills.targets_weakness: Lacked clear timing boundaries and completion markers

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on converting your technical knowledge into complete, timed task performances with clear start and end points.
